originalTitle: Microsoft introduces cheaper Surface devices with half the memory
summary: Microsoft just added a cheaper 12-inch Surface Pro and 13-inch Surface Laptop to its lineup. Both models come equipped with 8GB of RAM instead of 16GB, costing $849 for the specced-down Surface Pro and $949 for the Surface Laptop, as spotted earlier by Windows Central. When the 12-inch Surface Pro and 13-inch Surface Laptop launched […]
content: Microsoft just added a cheaper 12-inch Surface Pro and 13-inch Surface Laptop to its lineup. Both models come equipped with 8GB of RAM instead of 16GB, costing $849 for the specced-down Surface Pro and $949 for the Surface Laptop, as spotted earlier by Windows Central. When the 12-inch Surface Pro and 13-inch Surface Laptop launched in 2025, the base configurations offered 16GB of RAM and 256GB of USF storage, for $799 and $899, respectively. But in April 2026, Microsoft hiked the prices to $1,049 and $1,199. The memory crunch has also resulted in a higher base price for Microsoft’s newest Surface models. Other than slashing device memory in half, Microsoft hasn’t changed any other specs on the more affordable Surface Pro and Surface Laptop. They still come with the same 8-core Snapdragon X Plus chip and 256GB of storage, but won’t offer support for Copilot Plus, Microsoft’s built-in AI tech that requires at least 16GB of RAM.  Even with the price decrease, the 8GB Surface devices are still more expensive than the $599 MacBook Neo, which has disrupted the laptop space with its speedy performance and affordable price tag.
chineseTitle: 微软推出更便宜的 Surface 设备，内存减半
chineseSummary: 微软刚刚在其产品阵容中添加了更便宜的 12 英寸 Surface Pro 和 13 英寸 Surface Laptop。正如 Windows Central 早些时候发现的那样，这两款机型都配备了 8GB 内存，而不是 16GB，具体规格的 Surface Pro 售价为 849 美元，Surface Laptop 售价为 949 美元。当 12 英寸 Surface Pro 和 13 英寸 Surface Laptop 推出时 [...]
chineseContent: 微软刚刚在其产品阵容中添加了更便宜的 12 英寸 Surface Pro 和 13 英寸 Surface Laptop。正如 Windows Central 早些时候发现的那样，这两款机型都配备了 8GB 内存，而不是 16GB，具体规格的 Surface Pro 售价为 849 美元，Surface Laptop 售价为 949 美元。当 12 英寸 Surface Pro 和 13 英寸 Surface Laptop 于 2025 年推出时，基本配置提供 16GB RAM 和 256GB USF 存储，价格分别为 799 美元和 899 美元。但在 2026 年 4 月，微软将价格提高至 1,049 美元和 1,199 美元。内存紧缺还导致微软最新 Surface 机型的基本价格上涨。除了将设备内存削减一半之外，微软没有改变更实惠的 Surface Pro 和 Surface Laptop 的任何其他规格。它们仍然配备相同的 8 核 Snapdragon X Plus 芯片和 256GB 存储空间，但不提供对 Copilot Plus 的支持，Copilot Plus 是微软的内置人工智能技术，需要至少 16GB RAM。  即使价格下降，8GB Surface 设备仍然比 599 美元的 MacBook Neo 更贵，MacBook Neo 以其快速的性能和实惠的价格扰乱了笔记本电脑领域。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
